title: ExpandedPromptV4
description: Minimal pre-processed prompt for Pipeline v4. The prompt_expander only emits a richer textual description — style/size/rooms/category are derived downstream by the global_designer + floor_planner via RAG retrieval, not propagated from here.

expanded_description.description: Rich 80-200 word paragraph faithful to the user's intent. Adds concrete architectural vocabulary (materials, massing, vibe) but commits to NO structured fields — those are decided downstream.

implied_rooms.description: OPTIONAL. Roles de sala pedidos explícitamente en el prompt (p.ej. ['bedroom','bedroom','bedroom','bedroom','kitchen','kitchen']). Parseado determinista del prompt; se usa para sembrar room_role_hints y para la métrica prompt_adherence.
